"CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:L/UI:N/VC:L/VI:L/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-613", "name": "Insufficient Session Expiration"}], "description": "## Summary
Gateway `device.token.rotate` does not terminate active WebSocket sessions after credential rotation

## Current Maintainer Triage
- Status: open
- Normalized severity: low
- Assessment: v2026.3.28 rotates device tokens without disconnecting already-authenticated WebSocket sessions, which is a real but post-compromise revocation gap.

## Affected Packages / Versions
- Package: `openclaw` (npm)
- Latest published npm version: `2026.3.31`
- Vulnerable version range: `<=2026.3.28`
- Patched versions: `>= 2026.3.31`
- First stable tag containing the fix: `v2026.3.31`

## Fix Commit(s)
- `91f7a6b0fd67b703897e6e307762d471ca09333d` — 2026-03-31T09:05:34+09:00

## Release Process Note
- The fix is already present in released version `2026.3.31`.
- This draft looks ready for final maintainer disposition or publication, not additional code-fix work.

Thanks @zsxsoft for reporting.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00186, "percentile": 0.08339}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-rfqg-qgf8-xr9x", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-03T03:11:33Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rfqg-qgf8-xr9x", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-rfqg-qgf8-xr9x"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41356"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-04-03T03:11:33Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-rfqg-qgf8-xr9x", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/91f7a6b0fd67b703897e6e307762d471ca09333d", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/releases/tag/v2026.3.31", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41356", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-incomplete-websocket-session-termination-in-device-token-rotate", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-rfqg-qgf8-xr9x"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-rfqg-qgf8-xr9x", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw: Gateway `device.token.rotate` does not terminate active WebSocket sessions after credential rotation", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-06T23:25:26Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-rfqg-qgf8-xr9x", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.3.31", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.3.28"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenClaw: Gateway `device.token.rotate` does not terminate active WebSocket sessions after credential rotation
